## Summary

- 

## Checks

- [ ] Pulled latest `master` or confirmed why a pull was blocked
- [ ] Checked local status with `git status --short`
- [ ] Tested locally on `localhost` before relying on preview/production
- [ ] Ran `npm test`
- [ ] Ran `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] Reviewed the diff for unintended files

## Contract Drift

- [ ] Updated current docs if workflow, dashboard/session routes, or browse entrypoints changed
- [ ] Kept historical docs labeled as historical instead of treating them as startup truth
- [ ] Did not introduce a new command-center route/secret contract without updating scripts and docs together
